text:
{"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>In denen Thurneysischen Buchläden allhier werden die ersten zwey Theile von folgendem Werck denen Herren Subseribenten ausgeläffert: <BIBL><AUTHOR>Roberti Stephani</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Thesaurus Linguae Latinae post noviss. Londin. edit. insignitor auctam Annokationibus Honrici Stephani Locupletatus</TITLE>. Nova cura retensuit digessit &c. <AUTHOR>Ant. Birrius</AUTHOR>. <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT></BIBL> Ingleichen geben sie auch den <BIBL><TITLE>T. Lieium e. Integr. Sigonii & Gronovior Norit</TITLE> in <VOLUME>3. Voll.</VOLUME> auf schön Schreib-Median- Pappier in <FORMAT>8.</FORMAT> à <PRIZE>fl. 6.</PRIZE> künfftige Wochen an die Herren Liebhaber aus, dieser Preiß aber währet nur biß Ende Januarii <YEAR>1740</YEAR>. nach welcher Zeit kein Eremplar unter <PRIZE>7fl. 30. xr.</PRIZE> verkaufft werden solle.</BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":8,"explanation":"The following corrections were made:
1. Replaced the garbled Unicode sequence '√§' (√ + §) for 'ä' in 'Buchläden' with the proper XML character reference ä.
2. Replaced the garbled '√ºffert' sequence for 'ä' in 'ausgeläffert' with ä.
3. Replaced the bare '&' ampersand in 'digessit &c.' with the XML-safe entity '&'.
4. Replaced the bare '&' ampersand in 'Sigonii & Gronovior' with '&'.
5. Replaced the garbled '√∂n' sequence for 'ö' in 'schön' with ö.
6. Replaced the garbled '√†' sequence for 'à' (the price preposition) with à.
7. Replaced the garbled '√ºnfftige' sequence for 'ü' in 'künfftige' with ü.
8. Added the missing closing tag </BIBL> before </ITEM> to properly close the second <BIBL> element that was opened for the second bibliographic entry (T. Lieium...)."}

parsed.fixed_xml: <ITEM>In denen Thurneysischen Buchläden allhier werden die ersten zwey Theile von folgendem Werck denen Herren Subseribenten ausgeläffert: <BIBL><AUTHOR>Roberti Stephani</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Thesaurus Linguae Latinae post noviss. Londin. edit. insignitor auctam Annokationibus Honrici Stephani Locupletatus</TITLE>. Nova cura retensuit digessit &c. <AUTHOR>Ant. Birrius</AUTHOR>. <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT></BIBL> Ingleichen geben sie auch den <BIBL><TITLE>T. Lieium e. Integr. Sigonii & Gronovior Norit</TITLE> in <VOLUME>3. Voll.</VOLUME> auf schön Schreib-Median- Pappier in <FORMAT>8.</FORMAT> à <PRIZE>fl. 6.</PRIZE> künfftige Wochen an die Herren Liebhaber aus, dieser Preiß aber währet nur biß Ende Januarii <YEAR>1740</YEAR>. nach welcher Zeit kein Eremplar unter <PRIZE>7fl. 30. xr.</PRIZE> verkaufft werden solle.</BIBL></ITEM>
parsed.explanation:
The following corrections were made:
1. Replaced the garbled Unicode sequence '√§' (√ + §) for 'ä' in 'Buchläden' with the proper XML character reference ä.
2. Replaced the garbled '√ºffert' sequence for 'ä' in 'ausgeläffert' with ä.
3. Replaced the bare '&' ampersand in 'digessit &c.' with the XML-safe entity '&'.
4. Replaced the bare '&' ampersand in 'Sigonii & Gronovior' with '&'.
5. Replaced the garbled '√∂n' sequence for 'ö' in 'schön' with ö.
6. Replaced the garbled '√†' sequence for 'à' (the price preposition) with à.
7. Replaced the garbled '√ºnfftige' sequence for 'ü' in 'künfftige' with ü.
8. Added the missing closing tag </BIBL> before </ITEM> to properly close the second <BIBL> element that was opened for the second bibliographic entry (T. Lieium...).
